---
title: "Lovelace Bigg Wither"
---

## Lovelace Bigg Wither

**Dates:** (1805-1874)

### Description

of Manydown Park, landowner

### Biography

Eldest brother of the curate of Otterbourne, the Rev. William Harris Walter Bigg Wither, he was a first cousin of Sir William Heathcote.

### Letters

- Letter from March 29th [1855]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
